# >>> hermes-repo memory (do not edit this block manually)
# 个人层 — 不提交
.memory/captures/
.memory/sessions/
.memory/refs/
.memory/personal/
.memory/hermes-debug.log

# 团队层 — 提交
!.memory/topics/
!.memory/skills/
!.memory/MEMORY.md
!.memory/MEMORY-*.md
!.memory/team/
!.memory/config.json
!.memory/templates/
# <<< hermes-repo memory
